```prompt
---
agent: agent
description: "Test WebSocket connections for real-time communication"
---
# WebSocket Tests
## Task
Write tests for WebSocket connections and real-time messaging.
## Requirements
1. Test connection establishment and handshake.
2. Test message sending and receiving.
3. Test disconnection and reconnection.
4. Test broadcast to multiple clients.
5. Test error handling on malformed frames.
## Constraints
- Use async test client for WebSocket. Test both text and binary frames.
## Success Criteria
- Connection lifecycle tested. Messages flow correctly. Reconnection works.
```
